title: eriogonum pilosum
intro: Eriogonum pilosum, also known as Downy Buckwheat, is a perennial flowering plant native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Eriogonum pilosum include reducing inflammation, relieving digestive issues, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, and can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal benefits.
